work.work-title: O rossignuol ch'in queste verdi fronde

identification.creator: Claudio Monteverdi
identification.rights: Minor edits to the transcription by Vincent Carpentier published at https://www.cpdl.org/wiki/index.php/O_rossignuol_ch%27in_queste_verdi_fronde_(Claudio_Monteverdi)

credit.credit-words: Minor edits to the transcription by Vincent Carpentier published at https://www.cpdl.org/wiki/index.php/O_rossignuol_ch%27in_queste_verdi_fronde_(Claudio_Monteverdi)
